description_long: This object is a rectangular electronic device with a wood-textured front panel and a matte black body. The front features two large, textured rotary knobs on either side of a central display, which is likely an LCD or LED screen. Below the display are five rectangular push buttons, suggesting manual control for various functions. The sides and top are plain and solid black, with no visible vents or additional features. The back appears to be a solid panel, possibly with ports or connectors not visible in these views. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage or utilitarian audio or communication equipment, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or vehicles.
description: A rectangular electronic device with a wood-textured front, two large rotary knobs, a central display, and five push buttons, encased in a matte black body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood-textured panel, two large rotary knobs, central display, and five push buttons.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, matte black surface with the rotary knob slightly protruding from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid black panel with a hint of the wood-textured front edge visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain black surface and the other rotary knob slightly visible.
